annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Fla. Stat. § 55.03 — 8.06% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Florida’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at myfloridacfo.com. Not legal advice.
